summary: A medida que se dispara la demanda mundial de cobre, una de las mayores empresas mineras del mundo se encuentra en una situación precaria.

summary: Arts and crafts store Michaels has gone from a "grandmother’s store" to an unlikely business success. Michelle Cheng breaks down how. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.

title_cn: 高盛称盈利将推动重资产股票上涨

title_cn: 捷克政策制定者因通胀放缓而对服务价格持谨慎态度

title: Uzbekistan’s AKFA Picks Citi, JPM to Sound Out Bond Investors

title: Samsung’s Record Profit Fails to Impress After AI Chip Rally
title_cn: AI芯片上涨后，三星创纪录的利润未能给人留下深刻印象
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold, prompting investors to cash out of a near-150% rally this year that had baked in the AI-fueled growth.

title: China’s PBOC Buys Most Gold Since 2023 as Bullion Swings
title_cn: 随着金价波动，中国央行自 2023 年以来购买了最多黄金
summary: China’s central bank bought more gold in June, extending the longest buying streak since at least 2015 and underscoring a commitment to diversifying its reserves despite volatility in bullion prices.

title: Italy Revives Dollar Bond Sales for First Time Since Pandemic

title: Foreign Funds Return to India’s Banks After $12 Billion Selloff

summary: Global investors returned to India’s financial stocks after a three-month selling streak, as the central bank’s recent measures to draw foreign capital ease funding constraints for lenders.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/7/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/7/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The European Central Bank is navigating an uncertain economic situation even as the US and Iran move closer to a lasting peace deal, according to Governing Council member Fabio Panetta.

summary: After spending more than a year on the sidelines, global investors are showing fresh interest in India as sentiment begins to improve across the country’s markets.

summary: The SaaSpocalypse might as well have been called the SAPocalypse.

summary: A former Tesla Inc. scientist who worked on Elon Musk’s Optimus robot unveiled plans to produce a lightweight humanoid robot for manufacturing plants, logistics warehouses and homes.

summary: SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index Tuesday as Wall Street brokerages launch coverage of Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company with a clear consensus: buy the stock.

title_cn: WEF创始人施瓦布声称他在家中发现了间谍设备
summary: World Economic Forum founder Klaus Schwab has filed a criminal complaint following the alleged discovery of a secret listening device planted in his home office in Geneva.

title: Renewables Hit Record Share of India Power Mix as Coal Flatlines
title_cn: 可再生能源在印度电力结构中的份额创下历史新高，而煤炭则趋于平淡
summary: The share of renewable energy in India’s electricity mix rose to a record high this summer, highlighting the increasing importance of solar and wind in the world’s third-largest emitter.

title: ECB Asks Banks for Plans to Address AI Cybersecurity Threats
title_cn: 欧洲央行要求银行提供应对人工智能网络安全威胁的计划
summary: Europe’s banking regulator asked banks to come up with plans to address the growing threat from frontier artificial intelligence models such as Anthropic PBC’s Claude Mythos to cybersecurity.

title: India Objection to WhatsApp Username Switch Gets Somalia Backing
title_cn: 印度反对 WhatsApp 用户名转换得到索马里支持
summary: Somalia joined India in objecting to Meta Platforms Inc.’s planned WhatsApp username feature, citing security concerns in a country that’s been battling Islamist militants for two decades.

title: Nuveen's Cooper Sees Rotation Back Into Hyperscalers
title_cn: Nuveen 的 Cooper 预计将回归超大规模
summary: Laura Cooper, global investment strategist and macro credit head at Nuveen, discusses the outlook for equity markets and why she sees the potential for a rotation back into hyperscalers. "Valuations have come off, we're now seeing revenue growth have a slight upturn going forward, and we've seen several weeks of consecutive outflows," Cooper tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BAE-Backed Venture Capital Firm Expeditions Raises €197 Million Fund for European Defense Startups
title_cn: BAE 支持的风险投资公司 Expeditions 为欧洲国防初创公司筹集 1.97 亿欧元资金
summary: A defense-tech venture capital firm backed by BAE Systems and the NATO Innovation Fund has raised a €197 million ($225 million) fund to help develop sovereign military technologies in Europe.

title: Google and RWE Back German Nuclear Startup Proxima Fusion at €2.4 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Google 和 RWE 以 24 亿欧元的估值支持德国核电初创公司 Proxima Fusion
summary: German startup Proxima Fusion has raised €411 million ($469 million) from a range of investors, including national energy firm RWE AG and Alphabet Inc.’s Google, to develop a nuclear fusion plant it hopes will be operational in the 2030s.

title: Asia Stocks Drop on Chip Selloff, Nasdaq Futures Down
title_cn: 亚洲股市因芯片抛售而下跌，纳斯达克期货下跌
summary: Asian equities fell as renewed selling in technology stocks, including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc., deepened concerns that the AI-driven rally may have run ahead of itself. Futures for the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index retreated 1.1%, suggesting Monday’s rebound on Wall Street was losing momentum. European shares were also set for losses. Bloomberg's Avril Hong and Mark Cranfield report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Won’t Bring Back Era of Rapid Growth, Says Nobel Prize Winner
title_cn: 诺贝尔奖获得者表示，人工智能不会带回快速增长的时代
summary: A Nobel Prize-winning economist has warned that artificial intelligence will not return Western economies to the era of rapid productivity growth, which may be gone forever.

title: Why Samsung’s Record Profit Failed to Impress Investors
title_cn: 为什么三星创纪录的利润未能打动投资者
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold but failed to impress investors used to eye-catching growth from the suppliers of AI chips. Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin speaks with Constellation Research's Day Wang to understand what investors are thinking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Defense Stocks Rally Has Much Riding on NATO Summit
title_cn: 欧洲国防股上涨很大程度上得益于北约峰会
summary: A fledgling rebound in European defense stocks faces a test this week, as investors look to a NATO summit for further clarity on member states’ defense spending plans.

title: Self-Driving Startup Turing Gets AMD Backing and GPUs
title_cn: 自动驾驶初创公司 Turing 获得 AMD 支持和 GPU
summary: Self-driving tech developer Turing Inc. has added AMD Ventures to its list of backers and begun adopting Advanced Micro Devices Inc.’s AI accelerators in its systems.

title: Tencent Sells $1.5 Billion Kuaishou Stake as AI Pivot Quickens
title_cn: 随着 AI 转型加速，腾讯出售 15 亿美元快手股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. sold $1.5 billion of stock in Chinese TikTok rival Kuaishou Technology, paring mature internet bets during a pivot to artificial intelligence.

title: Chinese Firms Leave Nvidia for Local AI Suppliers, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，中国企业纷纷放弃英伟达，转向本土人工智能供应商
summary: Chinese companies are ditching Nvidia Corp.’s advanced accelerators in favor of domestic silicon, underscoring how tensions with the US are reshaping the AI infrastructure buildout and propelling Beijing’s ambitions to substitute American technology.

title: WiseTech Shares Jump After Billionaire White Quits as Chair
title_cn: 亿万富翁怀特辞去董事长职务后慧咨科技股价大涨
summary: Billionaire Richard White has stepped down as chair of WiseTech Global Ltd., just weeks after denying he was involved in human trafficking amid reports he was being investigated by police over claims he used a woman’s immigration status for sex.

title: Nvidia Supplier Unimicron Raises $1.4 Billion in GDS Sale
title_cn: Nvidia 供应商欣兴电子通过 GDS 出售筹集 14 亿美元资金
summary: Unimicron Technology Corp. raised $1.36 billion from a sale of global depositary shares, capitalizing on an artificial-intelligence frenzy that has lifted the Taiwanese chip supplier’s stock more than 700% over the past 12 months.

title: Samsung’s Soaring Profit Fails to Lift Shares
title_cn: 三星利润飙升未能提振股价
summary: Samsung's results are in the spotlight as investors try to gauge how long sky-high investments and valuations around AI will last. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Universal’s Latest ‘Minions’ Posts $62 Million in Debut
title_cn: 环球影业最新电影《小黄人》首映票房收入达 6200 万美元
summary: Minions & Monsters was the No. 1 movie in US and Canadian theaters over the long July 4 holiday weekend with ticket sales of $62 million, a number that still fell short of earlier entries in the seven-film franchise.

title: Intel-Backed AI Chip and Software Maker Syntiant Files for IPO
title_cn: 英特尔支持的人工智能芯片和软件制造商 Syntiant 申请 IPO
summary: Syntiant Corp., a company making semiconductors and software for artificial intelligence, filed for an initial public offering to tap investors’ enthusiasm for the technology.

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival | The Close 7/6/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能贸易复苏而上涨 |收盘价 7/6/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley PWM Executive Director Katerina Simonetti, BlackRock Deputy CIO of Global Fixed Income Russ Brownback, Jefferies Equity Research Analyst David Chiaverini, Hamilton Lane Co-CEO Erik Hirsch, Wells Fargo Investment Institute Head of Global Investment Strategy Paul Christopher, Bokeh Capital Partners Founder & Chief Investment Officer Kim Forrest, US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia, Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev, & Churchill Asset Management Vice Chairman & Chief Investment Strategist Randy Schwimmer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Private Credit is Fueling the Buy-Now-Pay-Later Boom
title_cn: 私人信贷如何推动“先买后付”热潮
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, we track how private credit is funding the Buy-Now-Pay-Later boom, what it means for borrowers and why the relationship is raising red flags. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk-Altman Judge Sends OpenAI Battle to Mediator
title_cn: 马斯克-奥特曼法官将 OpenAI 之战发送给调解员
summary: The judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman and their dueling AI startups enlisted a mediator to resolve the dispute.

title: Britain Needs £100 Billion a Year to Stabilize Public Debt, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 监管机构表示，英国每年需要 1000 亿英镑来稳定公共债务
summary: Andy Burnham faces a £100 billion ($134 billion) challenge if he wants to put Britain’s public finances on a sustainable path, the government’s fiscal watchdog warned.

title: Modi, Prabowo Seal BrahMos and Astra Missile Deals to Deepen Defense Ties
title_cn: 莫迪、普拉博沃签署布拉莫斯和阿斯特拉导弹协议，以深化防务关系
summary: India and Indonesia took a major step toward closer defense cooperation on Tuesday, signing agreements on missile systems as Prime Minister Narendra Modi met Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto in Jakarta.

title: China’s ICBM Tests Point to New Normal Rattling the Pacific
title_cn: 中国的洲际弹道导弹试验预示着太平洋地区的新常态
summary: China’s test this week of a submarine-fired ballistic missile may mark the beginning of more regular Pacific launches as the country advances its arsenal for delivering nuclear warheads, unsettling governments already wary of Beijing’s military buildup.

title: Singapore Plans Stiff Penalties for Drink Driving, Holding Phone
title_cn: 新加坡计划对酒后驾驶、拿着手机进行严厉处罚
summary: Singapore is looking to tighten enforcement and increase penalties for traffic violations as road fatalities in the city-state climbed.

title: US Is ‘Really Invested’ in Keeping Troops in Europe, Latvia Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚称美国“真正投入”在欧洲驻军
summary: The US has “really invested interest” to keep its troops in Europe, Latvian Foreign Minister Baiba Braze said as NATO allies await the outcome of Washington’s review of its military presence on the continent.

title: Duterte’s Alleged ‘Kill’ Threat Against Marcos Played at Trial
title_cn: 杜特尔特在审判中对马科斯进行了所谓的“杀死”威胁
summary: A video in which Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte allegedly threatened to have archrival President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. assassinated took center stage during the second day of her impeachment trial, after a defiant Duterte vowed to stand firm against efforts to oust her.

title: France Awaits Ruling on Whether Le Pen Can Run for President
title_cn: 法国等待勒庞能否竞选总统的裁决
summary: If she can’t, her right-wing party will turn to 30-year-old protégé Jordan Bardella.

title: Russia Attempting All Types of Provocations, Latvia's Braze Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚的布雷泽称俄罗斯试图进行各种类型的挑衅
summary: Latvian Foreign Minister Baiba Braze tells Bloomberg Television Russia is attempting "all types of provocations" as the war in Ukraine continues. Braze speaks with Bloomberg's Oliver Crook on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Touts Defense Deals to Show Trump It Is Stepping Up
title_cn: 北约兜售国防协议以向特朗普表明它正在加强
summary: NATO allies unveiled $12 billion in key defense industry deals to buy next-generation drones, surveillance planes and military aircraft — and convince US President Donald Trump that Europe is heeding his spending demands.

title: Xi Gives Trump an ‘Easy’ Win, Smoothing Path for Next Summit
title_cn: 习近平让特朗普“轻松”获胜，为下次峰会铺平道路
summary: President Xi Jinping’s agreement to free an imprisoned Christian pastor at President Donald Trump’s request showcased an improved state of US-China relations ahead of challenging negotiations looming in the run-up to their next summit in September.

title: UK, Poland See Progress Over New European Defense Financing Tool
title_cn: 英国和波兰在新的欧洲国防融资工具方面取得进展
summary: The UK, Poland, Netherlands, and Finland said they were making “significant progress” over a joint defense financing initiative aimed at creating cost-efficiencies during a massive military build-up to deal with escalating security threats from Russia.

title: NATO Leaders Prepare for Trump With a Wave of Deals
title_cn: 北约领导人通过一系列交易为特朗普做好准备
summary: NATO Photographer: Kerem Uzel/Bloomberg

title: Netanyahu Vows Israel Will Keep Occupying Lebanon, Syria, Gaza
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡誓言以色列将继续占领黎巴嫩、叙利亚和加沙
summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said last week that among the most important lessons from the 2023 Hamas attack was “having buffer zones inside enemy territory — not inside our territory.”

title: NATO Investing $40 Bln in Counter-Drone Defenses: Rutte
title_cn: 吕特：北约投资 400 亿美元用于反无人机防御
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte says the alliance is building "robust counter-drone defenses." Speaking at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey, Rutte says allies are investing "over $40 billion in counter-drone capabilities over the next five years." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qatari LNG Ship Struck in Strait of Hormuz, Testing US Talks
title_cn: 卡塔尔液化天然气船在霍尔木兹海峡触礁，考验美国谈判
summary: A laden liquefied natural gas carrier was hit by a projectile near the Omani coast as it exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement intended to halt attacks in the waterway.

title: Yates on Le Pen’s Verdict
title_cn: 耶茨谈勒庞的判决
summary: American Graduate School of Paris professor Douglas Yates discusses the possible outcomes of Marine Le Pen’s appeal trial and implications for the next French presidential elections. He spoke with Bloomberg’s Caroline Connan in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Camp Split on Cost-of-Living Plan as He Nears Power
title_cn: 伯纳姆营在接近权力时就生活费用计划产生分歧
summary: Andy Burnham, Britain’s likely next prime minister, faces competing advice from within his own camp on how to respond to the UK’s cost-of-living crisis, as he rushes to finalize his plans for government ahead of a Labour Party leadership contest that he’s poised to win.

title: Netherlands Has Maxed Out Its Military Support For Ukraine
title_cn: 荷兰已加大对乌克兰的军事支持
summary: The Netherlands has no more scope to offer direct military support to Ukraine, Dutch Defense Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz-Zegerius said.

title: NATO Allies Buying as Many as 10 Saab GlobalEye: Rutte
title_cn: 北约盟国购买多达 10 架萨博 GlobalEye：吕特
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte says some allies are procuring up to 10 GlobalEye ⁠surveillance planes ​from Saab as the military alliance's new airborne warning and control system (AWACS), succeeding the Boeing E-3A. He speaks at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Now Struggles to Intercept Ballistic Missiles, Data Show
title_cn: 数据显示，乌克兰现在很难拦截弹道导弹
summary: Ukraine’s ability to shoot down Russian ballistic missiles has deteriorated in recent large-scale attacks, a sign that Kyiv is lacking US-made Patriot interceptors to defend against strikes.

title: South Africa Treasury Cuts Johannesburg Funds Over Wage Bill
title_cn: 南非财政部削减约翰内斯堡工资法案资金
summary: South Africa’s National Treasury will withhold state funding for Johannesburg and dozens of other municipalities this month over their failure to manage their finances properly.

title: Samsung Slumps After Earnings; Tanker Hit in Hormuz Before NATO Summit | Daybreak Europe 7/7/2026
title_cn: 三星财报公布后股价暴跌；北约峰会前油轮在霍尔木兹被击中欧洲黎明 7/7/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, trading on South Korea's Kospi was halted briefly after a sharp fall. Samsung led the decline, dropping as much a 10% despite a 19-fold surge in quarterly profit. Futures point to a lower open in Europe and the US.

Oil edged higher after a tanker transiting the Strait of Hormuz reported being hit. Bloomberg understands it was an LNG carrier owned by Qatar's state-owned shipping company. Separately, Axios reported Iran fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the strait.

Today's guest: Anna Macdonald, Hargreaves Lansdown, Investment Strategy Director. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Military Might Fails to Curb Fentanyl Trade, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称墨西哥军方未能遏制芬太尼贸易
summary: Mexico’s military deployment to the state at the heart of the country’s drug trade has failed to curb fentanyl exports and bring down the homicide rate among young people, according to a report.

title: Forced-Labor Hearing Begins, Paving Way for More Trump Tariffs
title_cn: 强迫劳动听证会开始，为特朗普征收更多关税铺平道路
summary: A three-day hearing on the US Trade Representative’s latest plan to impose tariffs on major trading partners kicks off in Washington on Tuesday.

title: Court to Decide Whether Le Pen Can Run for President
title_cn: 法院将决定勒庞是否可以竞选总统
summary: A French court is set to decide today on whether Marine Le Pen will be able to run in next year's presidential election. The 57-year-old was sentenced in March to a five-year election ban and a two-year jail term that’s on hold while she appeals. She was accused of misusing about €474,000 ($540,000) between 2009 and 2016, when she was a member of the European Parliament. Douglas Yates from the American Graduate School in Paris speaks to Bloomberg's Caroline Connan about the upcoming verdict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi and Prabowo Seek to Strengthen India-Indonesia Ties
title_cn: 莫迪和普拉博沃寻求加强印度与印度尼西亚的关系
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto are set to sign defense and other deals on Tuesday to strengthen strategic ties. Bloomberg's Ruchi Bhatia reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Burnham Committed to Industrial Strategy, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示英国伯纳姆致力于产业战略
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle said the governing Labour Party’s industrial strategy will survive a change of leadership, arguing Keir Starmer’s likely successor, Andy Burnham, was “already committed” to the policy. Kyle made the comments Monday in an interview to Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is on the Agenda at the NATO Summit?
title_cn: 北约峰会的议程是什么？
summary: The NATO Summit starts today in the Turkish capital city of Ankara. Ahead of the gathering, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte cautioned that allies don’t have an endless supply of missile interceptors. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook breaks down the situation and what to expect from the military alliance's meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: It’s a Different, More Confident Zelenskyy Coming to NATO This Year
title_cn: 泽连斯基今年来到北约，是一个不同的、更加自信的人
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy is in good spirits ahead of talks with Donald Trump and other NATO leaders at their summit in Turkey, according to a person who spoke with him in recent days. The Ukrainian president has grounds for confidence.
